pi_items.source: Task definition; 'securecorp.net' is a fictional domain used for testing
CONFIRMED: Port 587 is the standard SMTP STARTTLS submission port (RFC 2587). Verified via Nx Witness documentation which lists 587 as a supported SMTP port option alongside 25, 465, and Auto.
CONFIRMED: TLS is a standard SMTP connection type. Verified via Nx Witness documentation which lists 'Secure connection using TLS' as a connection type option for SMTP configuration.
Task definition; fictional email address at fictional securecorp.net domain used for testing
Task definition; fictional SMTP username at fictional securecorp.net domain used for testing
Task definition; fictional password string used for testing purposes

privileged_info_summary: This task configures SMTP email alerts on Nx Witness VMS (version 5.1.5 or 6.0.1) using the REST API endpoint /rest/v1/system/settings. The SMTP settings include port 587 (standard SMTP STARTTLS submission port), TLS connection type (verified as standard SMTP encryption), and email addresses/credentials from the fictional securecorp.net domain. All data is synthetic test data (not real credentials or infrastructure), specified in the task for sandbox testing environments. The field names (smtpHost, smtpPort, smtpConnectionType, emailFrom, smtpUser, smtpPassword) are consistent with Nx Witness API naming conventions and the endpoint has been confirmed to exist in Nx Witness versions 5.x and 6.x.
